feature.name: Combine path remap
feature.description: Extract coverage.py PathAliases logic that remaps measured file paths when combining data from different machines or checkout roots.
included_behaviors: map absolute and relative paths through the first matching alias
normalize path separators to the alias result style
reject alias patterns ending in wildcards with ConfigError (message: must not end with wildcards)
skip mappings when the mapped target path does not exist
excluded_behaviors: coverage data combine I/O and SQLite storage

entanglement.description: Path remapping reuses glob-to-regex conversion, canonicalization, existence checks, and auto-generated relative alias rules.
signals: PathAliases layered on globs_to_regex and canonical_filename
implicit alias generation for unmatched relative paths

output.import: from featurelifted import PathAliases; from featurelifted.exceptions import ConfigError
output.signature: PathAliases(...).map(path: str, exists: Callable[[str], bool] = ...) -> str
